infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Find-Mee uses your location to show nearby members on the At Venue map and tag posts with your area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Find-Mee uses your location to show nearby members on the At Venue map and tag posts with your area.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Find-Mee uses your camera to take profile photos and post images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Find-Mee accesses your photo library to upload profile photos and post images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Find-Mee saves photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Find-Mee may access your microphone for video features.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Find-Mee uses your location to show nearby members on the At Venue map and tag posts with your area.

plugins.photosPermission: Find-Mee accesses your photos to upload profile and post images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Find-Mee uses your camera to take profile and post photos.
